selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

response_raw: {"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","opinion":"To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is essential to have a comprehensive strategy in place. This can include implementing fact-checking measures, using AI-powered tools for detection, and increasing transparency around the sources of information shared on the platform. Additionally, social media companies must work towards creating a culture of accountability, where users are encouraged to report any false content they come across. Finally, it is crucial to educate users on how to identify and verify the authenticity of information shared on social media, so that they can make informed decisions about what they choose to engage with.","reasoning_summary":"1. Educate users on how to identify and verify information authenticity","tone":"informative","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"None","used_persona_fields":[]}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is essential to have a comprehensive strategy in place. This can include implementing fact-checking measures, using AI-powered tools for detection, and increasing transparency around the sources of information shared on the platform. Additionally, social media companies must work towards creating a culture of accountability, where users are encouraged to report any false content they come across. Finally, it is crucial to educate users on how to identify and verify the authenticity of information shared on social media, so that they can make informed decisions about what they choose to engage with.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: 1. Implement fact-checking measures 2. Use AI-powered tools for detection 3. Increase transparency around sources of information 4. Create a culture of accountability 5. Educate users on how to identify and verify information authenticity
